x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspended
x-enumeration-literals.description: System is suspended, that is, not operational.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Active
x-enumeration-literals.description: System is functioning normally, that is, operational.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Closed
x-enumeration-literals.description: System is closed (eg. normal closure of an RTGS).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Closing
x-enumeration-literals.description: System needs to wait for completion of intermediate internal activities before going to a status Closed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReserveMaintenancePeriodStart
x-enumeration-literals.description: System is starting a new maintenance period.
